---
title: "Shopping Cart"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "A web-based e-commerce app featuring essential functionalities, including product display, cart management, and checkout."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-10-23
image: ../utils/shopping-cart.png
categories:
  - React
  - React Router
  - RTL
  - Vitest
  - CSS Modules
  - Vite
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://shopping-cart-eight-smoky.vercel.app/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/shopping-cart" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
